title: Medical Coder
description: Intuitive Surgical, maker of the da Vinci Surgical System, seeks a Medical Coder to support our healthcare documentation and regulatory compliance efforts in Provo. You'll assign ICD-10 and CPT codes to medical procedures and health records, ensuring accuracy for billing and data analysis. Join our growing team in a role that bridges healthcare operations and surgical innovation.
responsibilities: Review medical records and assign appropriate ICD-10 and CPT codes
Ensure coding accuracy and compliance with regulatory guidelines
Maintain confidentiality and handle patient information securely
Resolve coding discrepancies and questions with clinical staff
Stay current on coding updates and regulatory changes
Contribute to coding metrics and quality assurance programs

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; medical coding certification preferred
skills: Knowledge of ICD-10 and CPT coding systems
certifications: AAPC or AHIMA coding certification preferred
